stemHtml: The flight crew must be notified if a large amount of lithium batteries are being carried in cargo compartments, as these batteries...

options.a: explode when the cabin altitude is too high because of the differential pressure.
options.b: freeze at low temperatures, causing cracks in their metal casing.
options.c: have potential to produce heat, requiring fire fighters to be present during loading and unloading.
options.d: have the potential to start an uncontrolled chain reaction when an individual cell is damaged.
